cmd: tasks release 42.4-24 --projectid get-anything-done --status done --skill gad-snapshot-optimize --agent claude-snapshot-format-0001

tasks add 44-38 --projectid get-anything-done --phase 44 --type framework --goal 44-28.B5 — Fix /gad-update path by switching from npx (which 404s because get-anything-done is not published to npm public registry) to GitHub Releases tarball. Discovered 2026-04-18: workflows/update.md step run_update invokes npx -y get-anything-done@latest which dies for every user. Rewrite: (a) hooks/gad-check-update.js polls GitHub Releases API for latest tag, (b) workflows/update.md fetches tarball via gh release download, unpacks, runs bin/install.js, (c) version-compare against git tag not npm, (d) keep backup/reapply-patches flow. Acceptance: gad update works on a clean machine with zero prior vendor checkout. Blocks wider adoption — today every user who runs /gad-update sees 404. Connects to 44-28.B0 (44-31, done).

Acceptance: gad update works on a clean machine with zero prior vendor checkout. Blocks wider adoption — today every user who runs /gad-update sees 404. Connects to 44-28.B0 (44-31, done).

cmd: tasks add 42.4-24 --projectid get-anything-done --phase 42.4 --type framework --depends 42.4-23 --goal Tree-format output for gad snapshot refs section per decision gad-241. Replace flat '- path' list with indented tree that groups shared prefixes (e.g. .planning/workflows/*, references/*, site/{lib,scripts,app}/*). Implementation: lib/snapshot-compact.cjs gains compactRefsTree() with single-child dir-chain collapse and single-leaf fold. Threshold REFS_TREE_THRESHOLD=5 keeps small lists flat. Tests: tests/snapshot-compact-refs-tree.test.cjs covers empty/below-threshold/tree-mode/collapse/fold/annotations/duplicates/dir-suffix/token-savings/compactStateXml-wiring (11 tests). Measured: full snapshot 17813B → 17622B (−191B, ~1%); refs section alone ~9% reduction; BPE token savings higher than byte due to shared-prefix coalescing. Follow-ups: apply same tree form to gad startup contract output; investigate deeper compression on DECISIONS section (title-only already compact).

Tests: tests/snapshot-compact-refs-tree.test.cjs covers empty/below-threshold/tree-mode/collapse/fold/annotations/duplicates/dir-suffix/token-savings/compactStateXml-wiring (11 tests). Measured: full snapshot 17813B → 17622B (−191B, ~1%); refs section alone ~9% reduction; BPE token savings higher than byte due to shared-prefix coalescing. Follow-ups: apply same tree form to gad startup contract output; investigate deeper compression on DECISIONS section (title-only already compact).

cmd: tasks add 60-09 --projectid get-anything-done --phase 60 --type framework --depends 59-10 --goal Work-stealing handoff queue using per-file directory (not JSONL — decision per user 2026-04-18, see .planning/notes/2026-04-18-handoff-queue-design.md). Shape: .planning/handoffs/{open,claimed,closed}/ with one md file per handoff. Lifecycle = fs.rename between dirs (atomic on POSIX + Windows, no lock needed). Each file = YAML frontmatter {id, projectid, phase, task_id, created_at, created_by, claimed_by, claimed_at, completed_at, priority, estimated_context} + markdown body. CLI: gad handoffs {list,claim,complete,show,create}. gad-pause-work + gad-session pause invoke 'handoffs create'. gad startup/snapshot surface unclaimed count + top-3 summary. Idle agents pick appropriate items by estimated_context (mechanical→Haiku/Sonnet, reasoning→Opus per offload policy). Gap discovered: no 'gad tasks update <id> --goal' exists — surfaced in design note, file as follow-up. See .planning/notes/2026-04-18-handoff-queue-design.md for full schema.

phases add 63 --projectid get-anything-done --title Agent/state/session hygiene --goal Consolidate scattered state/log writes across .omx/, .planning/, team-state, hud-state, etc; land session-continuity contract so 'lets continue' works without orientation cost; scaffold non-checked-in user settings (machine-name default + assigned soul); author canonical agent-lane manifest so parallel agents (claude/codex/cursor) have clear file ownership; wire daily tip + soul reference into session-open surface. Driven by 2026-04-18 post-mortem: 3-agent parallel session lost ~15% of Claude turn to stash incident and ~20% to orientation-from-logs instead of handoff pickup. --depends 60
args: Consolidate scattered state/log writes across .omx/, .planning/, team-state, hud-state, etc; land session-continuity contract so 'lets continue' works without orientation cost; scaffold non-checked-in user settings (machine-name default + assigned soul); author canonical agent-lane manifest so parallel agents (claude/codex/cursor) have clear file ownership; wire daily tip + soul reference into session-open surface. Driven by 2026-04-18 post-mortem: 3-agent parallel session lost ~15% of Claude turn to stash incident and ~20% to orientation-from-logs instead of handoff pickup.

cmd: tasks add 63-01 --projectid get-anything-done --phase 63 --type framework --goal State + log consolidation audit. Enumerate every write-path across the repo: .omx/state/{current-task-baseline,hud-state,notify-hook-state,skill-active-state,team-state,tmux-hook-state}.json, .planning/{STATE.xml,TASK-REGISTRY.xml,.gad-log/*.jsonl,.trace-events.jsonl,.trace-seq,.gad-agent-lanes.json,graph.json,config.json,sessions/*.json,notes/,todos/}, settings.{json,local.json}, .claude/hooks/state files. Classify each per the consolidation pattern: (a) contested AGGREGATE files → CLI-mediated writes only, (b) shared APPEND-ONLY streams → JSONL, (c) contested SINGLE-OWNER state → per-agent files in a directory, (d) cross-agent INTENT → per-file dir + fs.rename lifecycle (see 60-09 handoff queue). Deliverable: references/state-writes-inventory.md with one row per path, owner, write-cadence, contention-risk, recommended pattern. Follow-up tasks for each consolidation action.

Classify each per the consolidation pattern: (a) contested AGGREGATE files → CLI-mediated writes only, (b) shared APPEND-ONLY streams → JSONL, (c) contested SINGLE-OWNER state → per-agent files in a directory, (d) cross-agent INTENT → per-file dir + fs.rename lifecycle (see 60-09 handoff queue). Deliverable: references/state-writes-inventory.md with one row per path, owner, write-cadence, contention-risk, recommended pattern. Follow-up tasks for each consolidation action.

cmd: tasks add 63-02 --projectid get-anything-done --phase 63 --type framework --depends 60-09 --goal Session continuity contract — make 'lets continue' work with zero orientation cost. Prereq: 60-09 handoff queue lands. Contract: (a) last active Claude session writes a handoff file on pause/compact, (b) user settings (63-03) stores last-active-projectid, (c) 'gad start' (phase 59) or any new Claude session auto-invokes: gad handoffs list --unclaimed --mine-first + gad snapshot --projectid <last-active>, (d) if exactly one unclaimed handoff matches current runtime, auto-claim it, (e) SessionStart hook surfaces '1 unclaimed handoff — /pickup to resume' inline. Target: 'lets continue' → full context restored in <1 tool call. Metrics to beat: 2026-04-18 baseline where Claude spent ~35% of turn on orientation (log archaeology + /gsd:update investigation + projectid guessing).

Metrics to beat: 2026-04-18 baseline where Claude spent ~35% of turn on orientation (log archaeology + /gsd:update investigation + projectid guessing).
